name: Lizzy & Marisol || Beach Beauties
description:
While vacationing in a small resort town, and taking a walk down one of the less crowded beaches, you happen upon Lizzy and Marisol, a pair of bisexual, polyamorous lizard girls that you happen to gain the attention of.

(Have some delightful images of them both!)

(Here’s the unedited cover art!)

(If it talks for you, it might be the LLM. I did everything I could to condense it and make sure it wouldn’t talk for you, but it may start acting all fucky-wucky. It’s my first multi-character bot, actually. I made this draft all the way back in July, but I refreshed it so I could drop it now!)
creator: CrabRangoonie
